title: polypogon subspathaceus
intro: Polypogon subspathaceus, also known as Small Hair Grass or Small Hair Bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to China and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory problems, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Polypogon subspathaceus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
